title: New Bike Tech: Robotic Wind Tunnel Dummies and Ready-to-Ride Italian Steel
content:
From Liv's radically redesigned aero road bike to a boutique gravel build from Officina Battaglin and a limited-edition Ornot fleece, here is the new gear we saw this week.

Read the full article at New Bike Tech: Robotic Wind Tunnel Dummies and Ready-to-Ride Italian Steel on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
